response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and systems engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core mandatory requirements. C++ experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (only MySQL/MongoDB), and no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain background — RIDE Capital was a retail investment startup using Node/TypeScript, not an investment-banking environment.
strengths: Strong low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Solid engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling authorship
Broad polyglot background with proven ability to pick up new stacks quickly
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~6 months, over a decade ago) versus the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets / investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; recent work centers on TypeScript/Node and MongoDB

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain exposure
Strong general engineering and low-latency systems fundamentals
